name: io.github.truman-t3/keyshot-mcp
title: KeyShot MCP
description: Control local KeyShot scenes, cameras, environments, and renders through headless scripting.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_HEADLESS_EXE
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to KeyShot headless, or a command available on PATH.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Root directory for rendered images and saved scenes.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_ALLOW_EXTERNAL_OUTPUTS
environmentVariables.description: Set to true only when output paths outside KEYSHOT_OUTPUT_DIR are required.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Timeout in milliseconds for one KeyShot headless process.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_MATERIAL_PRESETS
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a user-managed material preset JSON file.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_CAMERA_PRESETS
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a user-managed camera preset JSON file.
